Question
========

Who is familiar with these problems? (Select all that apply.)


Answerlist
----------

* Inconsistent data and file management aka 'I cannot find my files'
* Hardware failures (coffee spill, laptop dropped, lost laptop, broken USB) aka 'my work is lost'
* Extended periods of time between project actions aka 'I forgot what I was working on'
* Experimentation with new features aka 'I tried something and then everything was broken'
* All of the above 🤯
* None of the above 😇 (are you sure?)


Solution
========
This is a feedback question, there is **no correct answer**.
--> add `exextra[noCorrect,logical]: TRUE` to the Meta-information.

The `exsolution` below is only a technical requirement for R/exams and is 
ignored when exporting to Particify.
Make sure that the count in `exsolution` equals the number of answers.


Meta-information
================
exname: OS-M3-S4-Git_Q1
extype: mchoice
exsolution: 100000
expoints: 0
exextra[noCorrect,logical]: TRUE
